pages.text: $(bold)Novus$() is a world where the basics feel familiar — gather, cook, build, survive — but a handful of systems diverge in ways that are easy to miss.$(br2)This guide is a short survival manual for the first few hours, with explanations of the changed systems woven in where they matter.
pages.title: About this Guide

pages.text: $(bold)How to use it:$()$(br)$(li)Read $(italic)Of First Days$() in order — it's everything you need on day one.$(li)$(italic)Hearth & Season$() is cooking and the year, both relevant by day two or three.$(li)$(italic)Beyond the World$() gathers a few quiet utilities — favouriting worlds, pre-generation, reading the light.$(li)$(italic)Wayfaring$(), $(italic)Builder's Hand$(), and $(italic)Of Villages$() cover the rest — maps, decorative blocks, and the people who live in the world.$(li)$(italic)The Library$() lists every other in-game guide book.$(br2)The in-game books each mod ships do the deeper reference work; this guide just gets you started.
